title: Ayden
html:
Ayden

One of the most-load-bearing members of Yahir's Corvallis / OSU friend group — a recurring four-year presence across roommate logistics, fantasy-football leagues, and the friendship-friction notes. Ayden is one of the small set of names that crosses the housing, play, and introspection registers of Yahir's writing, which is itself the relationship's signature: he is in the daily-life base layer, not just an event-relationship.

The earliest dense appearance is in 2022 03 04 feeling of trying to shape a play do ball into a sphere or e (March 2022) — the play-doh-into-sphere metaphor note about friend-group dynamics. The operational decision recorded there: "Ayden accepted the barb role" — barb being a FBLA-era / OSU friend-group role that the corpus hasn't yet disambiguated. The note's metaphor — trying to shape a play-doh ball into a perfect sphere — is itself about the labor of maintaining friendships, and Ayden is the person Yahir is doing that labor with.

By June 2022 (2022 06 14 get josh allen), Ayden is on the 2022 fantasy-football boys roster alongside YG, Owen, Luke, Riley, Ryan, Kai, MQ, and Emilio — the same crew that recurs in the 2025 06 22 wedding list three years later. The roster persistence across three years is meaningful: this is the stable friend group, not a churn group. By May 2024 (2024 05 13 things pre asia trip / 2024 05 13 things) Ayden is the roommate, paired with Kyle in the rent-transfer logistics — Venmo internet bill splits, "decide on rooms for next year", room-coordination during the Shanghai-prep finals push. The mega-notebook 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook continues the same operational pattern: Ayden as a recurring action-item-name in the OSU rent + JCEF + Ford ecosystem.

What Ayden matters for in the graph is the type-specimen of stable peer. Unlike the high-volatility friend nodes (Dave in the 2021 accountability draft, Cam in the 2024–2026 partner-in-crime arc), Ayden shows up as the friend who is just there — fantasy league, roommate, group chat, year after year. He's the social infrastructure that lets the more dramatic relationships exist. The one substantive note about him (2022 03 04 feeling of trying to shape a play do ball into a sphere or e) is itself about the work of maintaining the kind of friendship Ayden represents — meaning Yahir is conscious of the labor required to keep base-layer friendships stable.
